ItacPersonItem.Notes: While he was a student in Padua, he acted as secretary of the Greek Nation at the University. Possibly, this is the same Mormori who was later appointed `Giudice al Maleficio` in Brescia. Mormori joined the Ricovrati in 1661.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
